name: Stanley Jordan
abstract: Stanley Jordan (born July 31, 1959) is an American jazz guitarist noted for his playing technique, which involves tapping his fingers on the fretboard of the guitar with both hands.

about_quotes.speaker: Jack Sheldon
about_quotes.evidence: Stanley, the guitar player, what’s his name? ... Yeah, Stanley Jordan came on. He had made a living outside doing that. So I wanted to do it.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jack Sheldon interviewed by Monk Rowe, Los Angeles, California, February 15, 1999

about_quotes.speaker: David Friesen
about_quotes.evidence: It seemed to me that you had something pretty innovative there, almost like Stanley Jordan when he did his guitar thing.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Friesen interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, September 24, 2024
